## 📚 Documentation Issue

**What documentation is affected?**
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Admin Panel Guide
- [ ] Integration Guide
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 📍 Location

Where is the documentation issue located?
- File: [e.g., README.md]
- Section: [e.g., "Quick Start"]
- Line number (if applicable): [e.g., line 45]
- URL (if online): [e.g., https://...]

## ❌ Current State

What is currently documented (or what's missing)?

```
Paste current documentation here, or describe what's missing
```

## ✅ Desired State

What should the documentation say instead?

```
Provide corrected or new documentation content
```

## 🎯 Type of Issue

- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Broken links
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Typo/Grammar
- [ ] Missing examples
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 👥 Audience

Who is the target audience for this documentation?
- [ ] End users
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] All

## 📊 Impact

How does this documentation issue affect users?
- [ ] Critical (blocks understanding of core functionality)
- [ ] High (significantly hinders usage)
- [ ] Medium (causes confusion)
- [ ] Low (minor inconvenience)

## 💡 Suggestions

Any suggestions for improving this documentation?

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples here.
